props.text: Generator G-3 (Steam) protection trip — over-current relay ANSI 51
138 kV bus voltage dip 8% below nominal (138 → 126 kV)
AGC increased G-4 and G-5 loading to compensate G-3 trip
G-5 derate active — governor limiting to 55% capacity
Load-D demand forecast updated: +1.2 MW for peak hour
Wind advisory: 45 mph gusts — cooling tower drift expected
G-3 field exciter fault confirmed — maintenance dispatched
